caption: A man with dark hair and a blue button-down shirt stands against a light blue background in a professional studio setting. He is wearing a small beige headset microphone and is speaking. Behind him, a logo reads "theCUBE" above the text "siliconANGLE". A blue lower-third graphic appears on the screen, identifying the speaker as "RISHI YADAV | @meditativesoul" and noting his title as "CEO" of "infoObjects". A small orange and white logo for "INFO-OBJECTS" is also visible on his shirt pocket. In the early part of the clip, a small "#BigDataSV" tag is present on the left side of the graphic. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak, shifting his facial expressions and slight head movements, while the graphics on the screen change slightly, eventually showing a "SPONSORED BY" tag next to the "INFO-OBJECTS" logo in the lower-left corner.
